      "それは2005年に設立されました。"
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それはTV-2のアルバム「For dig ku' jeg gøre alting」でバッキングボーカルを提供しました。",
      "それはデビューアルバム「Vi burde ses noget mere」を持っています。",
      "それはシングル「Gymnastik」を持っています。",
      "それはシングル「Centerpubben」を持っています。",
      "それはシングル「Du & jeg」を持っています。",
      "それはプロモーションシングル「Vi ka' alt vi to」を持っています。",
      "それはシングル「Walkmand」を持っています。",
      "それはセカンドスタジオアルバム「Alt går op i 6」を持っています。",
      "それはシングル「Party i provinsen」を持っています。",
      "それはシングル「Legendebørn」を持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それはライブショーでギタリストのNikolaj Teinvig、ベーシストのNicholas Findsen、キーボーディストのマッズ・ストーム、ドラマーのPeter Düringが伴奏することで特徴づけられます。",
      "それはAquaのバンドメンバーがフィーチャーされた「Centerpubben」のミュージックビデオで特徴づけられます。",
      "それはLeneによるクレジットなしのボーカルパフォーマンスをフィーチャーしたバラード「Vi ka' alt vi to」で特徴づけられます。",
      "それはMichael Hardingerによるボーカルサンプルをフィーチャーしたシングル「Walkmand」で特徴づけられます。",
      "それはDJ Katoによってリミックスされたシングル「Maskinerne」で特徴づけられます。",
      "それはデンマークのテレビ番組「Natholdet」を通じてリリースされたプロモーションシングル「The loser sign」で特徴づけられます。",
      "それはファンが自分たちのクリップを送ることが招待された「The loser sign」のミュージックビデオで特徴づけられます。",
      "それはAquaのヒット曲「Barbie girl」への言及を含む歌詞を持つシングル「Livet i plastik」で特徴づけられます。",
      "それはJohnny Reimarの「Sikken fest」とGunnar Nu Hansenの「Så der bas」をサンプリングしたシングル「Sikke en fest (Så da bas)」で特徴づけられます。",
      "それはJesper Binzerからのゲストボーカルをフィーチャーしたシングル「Ik ordinær」で特徴づけられます。"
    ],

AssociatedWith: It is associated with Aqua.
It is associated with Søren Rasted.
It is associated with Nicolaj Rasted.
It is associated with Nikolaj Teinvig on guitar.
It is associated with Nicholas Findsen on bass.
It is associated with Mads Storm on keyboards.
It is associated with Peter Düring on drums.
It is associated with TV-2.
It is associated with Michael Hardinger.
It is associated with Lene.
ConsistsOf: It consists of Søren Rasted and Nicolaj Rasted.
FoundedBy: It was founded by Søren Rasted and Nicolaj Rasted.
HasA: It has backing vocals on TV-2's album For dig ku' jeg gøre alting.
It has a debut album Vi burde ses noget mere.
It has a single "Gymnastik".
It has a single "Centerpubben".
It has a single "Du & jeg".
It has a promotional single "Vi ka' alt vi to".
It has a single "Walkmand".
It has a second studio album Alt går op i 6.
It has a single "Party i provinsen".
It has a single "Legendebørn".
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by live shows accompanied by Nikolaj Teinvig on guitar, Nicholas Findsen on bass, Mads Storm on keyboards and Peter Düring on drums.
It is characterized by a music video for "Centerpubben" featuring Søren's fellow band members of Aqua.
It is characterized by a ballad "Vi ka' alt vi to" featuring an uncredited vocal performance by Lene.
It is characterized by a single "Walkmand" featuring a vocal sample by Michael Hardinger.
It is characterized by a single "Maskinerne" remixed by DJ Kato.
It is characterized by a promotional single "The loser sign" released through the Danish TV show "Natholdet".
It is characterized by a music video for "The loser sign" where fans were invited to send in a clip of themselves.
It is characterized by a single "Livet i plastik" with lyrics referencing Aqua's hit "Barbie girl".
It is characterized by a single "Sikke en fest (Så da bas)" sampling Johnny Reimar's "Sikken fest" and Gunnar Nu Hansen's "Så der bas".
It is characterized by a single "Ik ordinær" featuring guest vocals from Jesper Binzer.
IsA: It is a Danish pop group.
KnownFor: It is known for the music video for "Centerpubben".
It is known for the single "Walkmand".
It is known for the single "The loser sign" being the group's first release not sung in Danish.
It is known for the single "Livet i plastik" referencing Aqua's hit "Barbie girl".
MemberOf: It is a member of Copenhagen Records.
It is a member of ArtPeople.
It is a member of Labelland.
It is a member of Sony.
UsedIn: It is used in the Danish album chart.
It is used in the Danish single chart.
It is used in the Danish comedy show Ditte & Louise.
